title: Outlook Calendar Sync - SELECT WHICH ITEMS SYNC
excerpt: Currently the outlook calendar integration syncs ALL items on the board. There is a workaround that involves having a replica board and duplicating only the items you want to sync, but this is not feasible on a large sca…

posts.author: Amyvacher (Amy Vacher)
posts.cookedHtml:
Currently the outlook calendar integration syncs ALL items on the board. There is a workaround that involves having a replica board and duplicating only the items you want to sync, but this is not feasible on a large scale and is not easy to set up.
I would ABSOLUTELY LOVE to have an outlook calendar sync that allows you to only sync certain items based on a status/label/dropdown/button - anything!!!
For example. If you had a list of clients to manage, you could select the status as ‘call scheduled’ and this would only sync the item dates with this status, so that only ‘scheduled calls’ go into your diary reminders.
Please consider this!!!

posts.author: Malachi (Malachi Allred)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @Amyvacher , this is possible and super easy to do with zzBots. You can modify our Microsoft Outlook (Online) to Monday.com 1-Way Sync bot pack to only sync events with a specific status/label or really anything… by using our If / Condition step.

1-Way Sync: https://www.zzbots.com/store/microsoft-outlook-calendar-online-mondaycom-1-way-sync

If you need any help or have any questions, just chat with us on our website.
